metadata.description: Blends two shaders with a factor - maps to Lerp in shader graph

summary: Blends between two complete shaders (e.g., diffuse + glossy, or metal + plastic). Unity achieves this by blending material properties.

parameters.Shader1: First shader (could be Diffuse, Glossy, etc.)

implementation.approach: Decompose shaders to base properties and blend

example.blender: Mix rough diffuse (Roughness=0.8) with shiny glossy (Roughness=0.1)
example.unity: Lerp Smoothness: (1-0.8)=0.2 to (1-0.1)=0.9 with factor T

limitations: Cannot blend complex shader features (subsurface, anisotropy) - only base PBR properties
compatibility_loss_15_percent: Complex shader layering not fully supported; works for simple material transitions
